languages.text: "Вего-Ан, ты лишился рассудка?! Покаяние наше — жизнь в этих темных туннелях, средь Мороков и Кошмаров! Страдания — наш удел, иначе как ты омоешься от греха?"

traits.locale_text: "Вего-Ан, ты лишился рассудка?! Покаяние наше — жизнь в этих темных туннелях, средь Мороков и Кошмаров! Страдания — наш удел, иначе как ты омоешься от греха?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Вего-Ан, ты лишился рассудка?! Покаяние наше — жизнь в этих темных туннелях, средь Мороков и Кошмаров! Страдания — наш удел, иначе как ты омоешься от греха?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Vego-An, have you gone mad? Our repentance is to live in this dark tunnels, among visions and nightmares! Our lot is to suffer, how else can we purge ourselves?"
languages.original_text: "Вего-Ан, ты лишился рассудка?! Покаяние наше — жизнь в этих темных туннелях, средь Мороков и Кошмаров! Страдания — наш удел, иначе как ты омоешься от греха?"

traits.locale_text: "Vego-An, have you gone mad?! Our repentance is to live in this dark tunnels, among visions and nightmares! Our lot is to suffer, how else can we purge ourselves of sin?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Vego-An, have you gone mad?! Our repentance is to live in this dark tunnels, among visions and nightmares! Our lot is to suffer, how else can we purge ourselves of sin?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Vego-An, have you gone mad? Our repentance is to live in this dark tunnels, among visions and nightmares! Our lot is to suffer, how else can we purge ourselves?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Vego-An, bist du verrückt geworden? Unsere Buße besteht darin, in diesen dunklen Tunneln zu leben, inmitten von Visionen und Albträumen! Unser Los ist es, zu leiden, wie könnten wir uns sonst läutern?"
languages.original_text: "Vego-An, have you gone mad? Our repentance is to live in this dark tunnels, among visions and nightmares! Our lot is to suffer, how else can we purge ourselves?"

languages.text: "Végo-An, es-tu devenu fou ? Notre repentir est de vivre dans ces sombres tunnels, parmi les visions et les cauchemars ! Notre sort est de souffrir, comment nous purger autrement ?"
languages.original_text: "Vego-An, have you gone mad? Our repentance is to live in this dark tunnels, among visions and nightmares! Our lot is to suffer, how else can we purge ourselves?"

languages.text: "织女星，你疯了吗？我们的忏悔就是生活在这黑暗的隧道里 在幻觉和噩梦中苟延残喘我们的命运就是受苦 我们还能怎样净化自己？"
languages.original_text: "Vego-An, have you gone mad? Our repentance is to live in this dark tunnels, among visions and nightmares! Our lot is to suffer, how else can we purge ourselves?"

languages.text: "Vego-An, ¿te has vuelto loco? ¡Nuestro arrepentimiento es vivir en estos túneles oscuros, entre visiones y pesadillas! Nuestra suerte es sufrir, ¿de qué otra forma podemos purgarnos?".
languages.original_text: "Vego-An, have you gone mad? Our repentance is to live in this dark tunnels, among visions and nightmares! Our lot is to suffer, how else can we purge ourselves?"

languages.text: 「ベゴ＝アン、気が狂ったのか？私たちの悔い改めとは、この暗いトンネルの中で、幻と悪夢の中で生きることだ！私たちの運命は苦しむことであり、それ以外にどうやって身を清めるというのだ？
languages.original_text: "Vego-An, have you gone mad? Our repentance is to live in this dark tunnels, among visions and nightmares! Our lot is to suffer, how else can we purge ourselves?"

languages.text: "Vego-An, çıldırdın mı sen? Bizim tövbemiz bu karanlık tünellerde, hayaller ve kâbuslar arasında yaşamak! Kaderimiz acı çekmek, kendimizi başka nasıl arındırabiliriz?"
languages.original_text: "Vego-An, have you gone mad? Our repentance is to live in this dark tunnels, among visions and nightmares! Our lot is to suffer, how else can we purge ourselves?"
